title: B's SleepingBag
description: You can sleep anywhere with a bed, while not setting your respawn.
body:
**This plugin allows you to sleep anywhere and not set spawnpoint.**

This is very useful if you want to skip the night, but you want to break the bed after. Sleeping in a bed and breaking it sets your spawn to worldspawn. But with this plugin just **right click in the air with a bed** and sleep well! No spawn set, and the bed gets back to you on the instant you wake up.
